historical_notes: Prince Shang of Guangzong {Cao} Ji died early and was posthumously bestowed the title in the 5th year of Taihe. He had no descendants.

full_text:
Cao Ji 曹棘
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cao Ji (曹棘). Died early and was later made a Prince. Cao Ji was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.

BiographyHistoric (Confirmed)
Prince Shang of Guangzong {Cao} Ji died early and was posthumously bestowed the title in the 5th year of Taihe. He had no descendants.
